code:
import io
import string
import list

fn range_eq(_ s: String, _ a: Int, _ b: Int, _ c: Int, _ d: Int) -> Bool
  let la = b - a
  let lb = d - c
  if la != lb
    false
  else
    mut i = 0
    mut eq = true
    while i < la
      let ba = match string.byte_at(s, a + i)
        when Some(x)
          x
        when None
          0
        end
      let bb = match string.byte_at(s, c + i)
        when Some(x)
          x
        when None
          0
        end
      if ba != bb
        eq = false
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    eq
  end
end

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)

mut starts: List<Int> = []
mut stops: List<Int> = []
mut i = 0
mut in_tok = false
mut tok_start = 0

while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(input, i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
  let is_ws = b <= 32
  if in_tok
    if is_ws
      starts = list.push(starts, tok_start)
      stops = list.push(stops, i)
      in_tok = false
    end
  else
    if not is_ws
      tok_start = i
      in_tok = true
    end
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if in_tok
  starts = list.push(starts, tok_start)
  stops = list.push(stops, n)
end

let m = list.len(starts)
mut best_count = 0
mut best_start = 0
mut best_stop = 0
mut k = 0

while k < m
  let sk = match list.get(starts, k)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
  let ek = match list.get(stops, k)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
  mut j = 0
  mut is_first = true
  while j < k
    let sj = match list.get(starts, j)
      when Some(x)
        x
      when None
        0
      end
    let ej = match list.get(stops, j)
      when Some(x)
        x
      when None
        0
      end
    if range_eq(input, sj, ej, sk, ek)
      is_first = false
    end
    j = j + 1
  end
  if is_first
    mut count = 0
    mut p = 0
    while p < m
      let sp = match list.get(starts, p)
        when Some(x)
          x
        when None
          0
        end
      let ep = match list.get(stops, p)
        when Some(x)
          x
        when None
          0
        end
      if range_eq(input, sp, ep, sk, ek)
        count = count + 1
      end
      p = p + 1
    end
    if count > best_count
      best_count = count
      best_start = sk
      best_stop = ek
    end
  end
  k = k + 1
end

let top = string.substring(input, best_start, best_stop)
print("top=#{top}=#{best_count}")
